ml_top_positive_drivers.interpretation: Clean promoter background — low character risk
No material litigation — low legal risk
Large listed company — asset base inferred
Stable sector — neutral to mildly positive for lending

decision_rationale: The loan for Yes Bank is approved, reflecting a strong Blended Risk Score of 79.76/100 and an 'A' rating. The bank exhibits robust Character (88) and strong Capacity (82), underscored by an exceptional EBITDA margin and positive Q1 FY2025-26 results, despite a thin Interest Coverage Ratio and an NPA mention. Substantial Capital (65) and Collateral (78) are evident from its significant asset base and proactive capital raise initiatives. Favorable industry Conditions (70) and strategic growth plans further bolster its profile, supporting the proposed expansion of digital banking infrastructure and lending capacity. This approval is well-justified by the overall financial health and strategic direction, despite the minor penalty for NPA classification mentioned.
